acquisition method: data were acquired using data-dependent acquisition (DDA)
cleavage agent: the searches were performed allowing optional methionine oxidation and acetylation protein N terminal, and as fixed modification, carbamidomethylation of cysteine
fragmentation method: for higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD) fragmentation
instrument: Data were acquired using a Q‐Exactive ultra‐high field mass spectrometer (HF‐MS)
labeling: the analysis was performed at a flow rate of 0.5 mL min−1 and the mobile phase contained 10 mM NaOH from start to end
